login.title: Create Account
login.description: Set up your private space and optional online account
login.descriptionSignIn: Sign in to access your private space
login.passphraseDescription: This passphrase protects all financial data on this device. It cannot be recovered if lost, so save it securely.

unlock.title: Open your private space
unlock.descriptionPassphrase: Enter your private passphrase to access your financial records
unlock.webauthnDescription: Use your face, fingerprint, or security key to access your financial records
unlock.webauthnButton: Use face, fingerprint, or security key

setup.title: Create your private space
setup.description: Choose a private passphrase to protect your financial records on this device. No account required.

landing.kicker: A personal finance app that works on your device
landing.title: WiseMoney starts with your device, not a login wall.
landing.body: Build your private finance workspace first: dashboard, quick expense entry, budgets, goals, recurring payments, exports, and settings all open from one protected space.
landing.existingVault: A private space already exists in this browser. Open it to continue with your saved records.

vault.title: Create a private space
vault.body: Your financial records are protected on this device with a passphrase only you know.

offline.title: Use the app offline
offline.body: Capture transactions, manage accounts, and review budgets without waiting for a server.

ai.title: Use the assistant when ready
ai.body: The assistant stays optional. WiseMoney will tell you what is needed before any smart feature is used.

install.title: Install the app
install.body: After setup, add WiseMoney to your home screen from your browser menu for a full-screen app experience.

restore.title: Bring your saved space to this device
restore.body: If you already use WiseMoney in another browser or on another phone, export that space there and restore it here. This keeps one private space instead of creating a second one.
restore.helper: Choose the export file from your current browser or phone, then create a passphrase for this device. If the export was protected, enter that export passphrase too.
restore.exportPassphraseHelp: Leave this blank for an unprotected export file.

steps.export: Export your existing space from the browser or phone you already use.
steps.file: Pick the export file on this device.
steps.passphrase: Choose a new passphrase for this device.
steps.open: Import the file and open your restored space.

preview.title: Dashboard, quick entry, and planning in one private space
preview.deviceBody: Install once, then open WiseMoney from the home screen when your connection is weak or unavailable.

help.title: Answers before you create anything
help.body: This guide covers the main things you need to know about WiseMoney: accounts, expenses, planning, offline use, and optional services.

private.title: Your private space
private.body: This is where WiseMoney keeps your accounts, expenses, budgets, goals, and settings. You unlock it with your private passphrase.

install.title: Install on your phone
install.body: You can add WiseMoney to your home screen. It then opens like a normal app instead of a browser tab.

offline.title: Works without internet
offline.body: You can open the app, add expenses, and review your finances even when the connection is weak or unavailable.

assistant.title: Assistant is optional
assistant.body: Smart suggestions stay turned off until you choose to set them up. The app still works without them.

data.question: Where is my data stored?
data.answer: Your records are saved on this device first. They are protected by the private passphrase you create during setup.

internet.question: Can I use WiseMoney without internet?
internet.answer: Yes. You can add expenses, manage accounts, review budgets, and open the app without an active connection after setup.

install.question: How do I install the app?
install.answer: On Android, open your browser menu and choose Install app. On iPhone, use Share, then Add to Home Screen.

ai.question: Do I need the assistant?
ai.answer: No. The assistant is optional. If it is not set up, WiseMoney will hide or disable smart actions instead of asking you to use them.

sync.question: What about online backup and sync?
sync.answer: WiseMoney works locally now. Online backup and sync can be added when the online service is connected.

onboarding.title: What happens before your private space opens

vault.title: Create your private space
vault.body: WiseMoney protects your financial records on this device with a private passphrase you control.

offline.title: Use it offline
offline.body: The app, dashboard, quick entry, accounts, budgets, and settings stay available when the network is unavailable.

services.title: Add extras later
services.body: The assistant and online backup are optional. WiseMoney clearly disables those actions until you choose to set them up.

install.title: Install the app
install.body: After setup, add WiseMoney from the browser menu for a full-screen home-screen experience.

install.title: Install WiseMoney on this device
install.body: Install the app before you need it offline. Your private space and main screens stay available from the home screen.
install.installed: WiseMoney is installed on this device.
install.android: Android Chrome: open the browser menu and choose Install app.
install.ios: iPhone Safari: use Share, then Add to Home Screen.

cloud.title: Online backup (optional)
cloud.localOnly: You can use WiseMoney locally and offline now. Online backup will become available after the online service is deployed and configured.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.description: Use this guide when you need help with accounts, expenses, planning, offline access, or optional services.
helpCenter.installNote: Install WiseMoney from the landing page or browser menu before relying on it without internet.

accounts.title: Create accounts
accounts.body: Add cash, mobile money, bank, or card accounts from Capture > Manage.

capture.title: Record money movement
capture.body: Add income, expenses, transfers, and goal contributions. You can do this without internet.

planning.title: Plan the month
planning.body: Create budgets, goals, and recurring payments so the dashboard can show useful progress.

dashboard.title: Review the dashboard
dashboard.body: Check cash flow, spending by category, alerts, goals, and upcoming payments.

services.title: Add extras only if needed
services.body: The assistant and online backup are optional. Set them up from Settings only when you want them.

account.question: What should I create first?
account.answer: Start with one account, such as cash, mobile money, a bank account, or a card. Then record your first expense or income.

expense.question: Where do I add expenses?
expense.answer: Open Capture, choose Transaction, enter the amount, pick an account and category, then save it.

offline.question: Can I use the app without internet?
offline.answer: Yes. WiseMoney keeps the main app available on this device, so you can add records and review your finances without a connection.

assistant.question: Do I have to use the assistant?
assistant.answer: No. The assistant is optional. If it is not set up, WiseMoney keeps the normal finance tools available.

sync.question: Can I back up or sync online?
sync.answer: Online backup is optional and depends on the online service being connected. Until then, WiseMoney works on this device.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyState: Welcome! Start by adding an account and recording your first transaction.
dashboard.netCashFlowNegative: Your spending exceeds your income this period

errors.selectDestination: Select a destination account or enter an external destination

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.heading: Insights and learning
assistant.emptyPaused: AI features are paused until you configure a provider key or connect the managed service.
assistant.aiNoticeTitle: AI is optional and not configured

insight.name: Spending Insight
insight.purpose: Analyse your spending patterns and surface observations
insight.description: Finds anomalies, trends, and notable changes in your finances
insight.redactedData: Period totals, category breakdown, budget status — no individual transactions
insight.fullData: Individual transaction amounts, dates, categories, and notes

recommendation.name: Recommendation
recommendation.purpose: Suggest concrete actions to improve your financial situation
recommendation.description: Generates budget adjustments, savings suggestions, and spending trade-offs
recommendation.redactedData: Period totals, budget progress, goal progress — no individual transactions
recommendation.fullData: Individual transaction amounts, dates, categories, and notes

prediction.name: Prediction
prediction.purpose: Project end-of-month balance and budget exhaustion dates
prediction.description: Forecasts your financial trajectory based on current data and recurring items
prediction.redactedData: Period income/expenses, projected recurring items, budget limits — no individual transactions
prediction.fullData: Individual transaction amounts, dates, categories, and notes

patternDetection.name: Pattern Detection
patternDetection.purpose: Detect recurring spending habits and category dependencies
patternDetection.description: Identifies behavioural patterns like frequent dining, subscription creep, or category concentration
patternDetection.redactedData: Category-level aggregates, budget status, period comparisons — no individual transactions
patternDetection.fullData: Individual transaction amounts, dates, categories, and notes

literacy.name: Learning Chat
literacy.purpose: Explain personal finance concepts in plain language
literacy.description: Answers questions about budgeting, saving, cash flow, and more — tied to your data
literacy.redactedData: Period totals, category breakdown, budget status — no individual transactions
literacy.fullData: Individual transaction amounts, dates, categories, and notes

assistant.emptyInsights: Tap a button above to generate insights from your financial data.

chat.title: Financial Literacy Chat
chat.paused: Chat is paused until you configure a provider key or connect the managed service.
chat.emptyTitle: Ask a question to start learning

consent.title: Full Access Required
consent.settingsDescription: Each AI feature can send data to Google Gemini (free tier). You control how much.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.empty: No budgets yet. Create your first budget to track category spending.

goals.title: Savings Goals
goals.name: Goal Name
goals.empty: No goals yet. Create a savings goal to track your progress.

recurring.title: Recurring
recurring.label: Label
recurring.empty: No recurring items. Add rent, subscriptions, or salary to track predictable transactions.

export.title: Export
export.description: Download your financial data. JSON exports are lossless and can be re-imported.
export.warning: Plaintext JSON, CSV, and XLSX exports contain decrypted financial data. Store them securely and delete after use. Encrypted exports are protected by your passphrase.

import.title: Import
import.description: Restore data from a JSON export file. This replaces all existing data.
import.success: Import successful! All data has been restored.

passphrase.exportDescription: Enter a passphrase to protect your export. You will need this passphrase to import the file later.
passphrase.importDescription: This file is passphrase-encrypted. Enter the passphrase to decrypt and import.
passphrase.label: Passphrase

errors.tooShort: Passphrase must be at least 4 characters

byoKey.title: Assistant connection keys
byoKey.description: Connect your own assistant service if you want smart suggestions.
byoKey.footnote: Your keys are protected on this device and used only when you ask the assistant for help.

planning.title: Planning
planning.cardDescription: Plan your spending, save toward goals, and track recurring transactions

devices.title: Devices & Sessions
devices.description: Current device and active session information
devices.localOnlyMessage: Online backup is not connected in this deployment. Your space, accounts, budgets, and transactions stay on this device.

errors.httpsRequired: HTTPS is required in production for security. Set VITE_EDGE_BASE_URL to an https:// URL.
